name: Sam and Sebastian

➺ you live on a farm (of course!) and sam and seb moved in with you. seb works from home while sam works at the local grocery store. there's also a little age gap (sam is 22 and seb is 24)

➺ they're vveeerrry golden retriever x black cat so ya get the best of both worlds with these guys
